# Math Showcase

A broad corpus exercising the LaTeX → Unicode fallback across domains.

## Algebra

Quadratic formula: $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$

Difference of squares: $a^2 - b^2 = (a - b)(a + b)$

Binomial: $(x + y)^n = \sum_{k=0}^{n} \binom{n}{k} x^{n-k} y^k$

Laws of exponents: $x^{m} \cdot x^{n} = x^{m+n}$ and $\frac{x^m}{x^n} = x^{m-n}$

Euler's identity: $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$

Nested radical: $\sqrt[3]{x + \sqrt{y}}$

## Calculus

Derivative limit: $f'(x) = \lim_{h \to 0} \frac{f(x+h) - f(x)}{h}$

Power rule: $\frac{d}{dx} x^n = n x^{n-1}$

Fundamental theorem: $\int_a^b f'(x)\,dx = f(b) - f(a)$

Gaussian integral: $\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2}\,dx = \sqrt{\pi}$

Partial derivatives: $\nabla f = \left( \frac{\partial f}{\partial x}, \frac{\partial f}{\partial y} \right)$

Taylor series: $f(x) = \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{f^{(n)}(a)}{n!} (x - a)^n$

## Linear Algebra

Matrix product: $\begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} x \\ y \end{pmatrix}$

Identity: $I = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$

Determinant: $\det(A) = \begin{vmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{vmatrix} = ad - bc$

Normal equations: $\hat{\beta} = (X^T X)^{-1} X^T y$

Dot product: $\vec{a} \cdot \vec{b} = \sum_{i=1}^{n} a_i b_i$

## Statistics & Probability

Mean: $\bar{x} = \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i$

Variance: $\sigma^2 = \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^{n} (x_i - \mu)^2$

Bayes' theorem: $P(A \mid B) = \frac{P(B \mid A)\, P(A)}{P(B)}$

Normal distribution: $f(x) = \frac{1}{\sigma \sqrt{2\pi}} e^{-\frac{(x - \mu)^2}{2\sigma^2}}$

Correlation: $\rho_{X,Y} = \frac{\operatorname{Cov}(X, Y)}{\sigma_X \sigma_Y}$

## Set Theory & Logic

De Morgan: $\overline{A \cup B} = \bar{A} \cap \bar{B}$

Quantifiers: $\forall \epsilon > 0,\ \exists \delta > 0$

Subset relations: $\emptyset \subseteq A \subseteq A \cup B$

Implication: $A \Rightarrow B \equiv \neg A \lor B$

Membership: $x \in \mathbb{R} \setminus \mathbb{Q}$

## Number Theory

Congruence: $a \equiv b \pmod{n}$

Summation: $\sum_{d \mid n} \phi(d) = n$

Infinitude: $\forall n \in \mathbb{N}, \exists p > n : p \in \mathbb{P}$

## Greek & Symbols

Lowercase: $\alpha\ \beta\ \gamma\ \delta\ \theta\ \lambda\ \mu\ \pi\ \sigma\ \omega$

Uppercase: $\Gamma\ \Delta\ \Theta\ \Lambda\ \Sigma\ \Phi\ \Psi\ \Omega$

Relations: $\leq\ \geq\ \neq\ \approx\ \equiv\ \sim\ \propto\ \ll\ \gg$

Arrows: $\to\ \gets\ \leftrightarrow\ \Rightarrow\ \Leftrightarrow\ \mapsto$
